name: Pasta with Artichoke Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 package artichoke hearts, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add chopped onion and garlic. Cook until the onion is soft and golden, about 5 minutes.
2. Stir in the cooked artichoke hearts. Reduce heat to medium-low and cook for an additional 3 minutes.
3. Add chopped parsley, white wine, black olives, and lemon zest. Mix well and let it simmer for a few seconds until all flavors are combined.
4. Toss the sauce with hot fettuccine in a large pan or skillet. Adjust seasoning with salt and pepper if needed.
5. Serve topped with grated Parmesan cheese.
